changelog:
Import: backend now auto-detects External IdP (Microsoft Entra) accounts from issuerUrl/idpClientId/provider, so a stale cached frontend or a JSON export missing authMethod no longer misclassifies them as social (which failed with 401 Bad credentials).
Export: single-account detail export now includes issuerUrl/idpClientId/scopes/loginHint so External IdP accounts can refresh after re-import.
Import: backend tự nhận diện tài khoản External IdP (Microsoft Entra) từ issuerUrl/idpClientId/provider, tránh bị phân loại nhầm thành social (gây lỗi 401 Bad credentials) khi frontend cũ bị cache hoặc JSON export thiếu authMethod.
